stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a Regulated Take-Off Weight (RTOW) Table for runway 05L from intersection VB. Find V1, VR, and V2 speeds for a reduced thrust take-off, given the following information.

OAT: -2°C
Wind: 050°/05
QNH: 1033 hPa
Anti-Ice (ENG only): ON
Packs: ON
Assumed/FLEX T°: 59°C
Line-up: Quick
Runway: WET
Take-off weight (TOW): Regulated Take-Off Weight (RTOW)
(Do NOT interpolate, instead, use the most conservative numbers at all times)
